response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and deep technical fluency across languages and platforms, including AI-agent tooling; however, he lacks clear evidence of 15 years in cloud/AI infrastructure leadership, has no advanced degree in AI, and his AI experience is tangential rather than core to his career trajectory.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Strong full-stack and systems engineering across diverse tech stacks including DLang, Node.js, and cloud tools
Active knowledge sharing through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 15 years focused on cloud or AI infrastructure engineering
Lacks advanced degree in AI or demonstrated AI product leadership
AI-related work is limited to tooling support, not strategic platform design or customer advisory
